payload.answer: Slack is the confirmed primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Project State Brain. Telegram is not currently supported for memory ingestion.
payload.decision: Slack is designated as the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Project State Brain (Fixture ID: project_state_brain_slack_agent_001). Telegram integration is deferred to a future phase.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity matches the primary ingestion interface designation for Slack.

memory_cards.statement: Slack is the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for durable memory storage in Project State Brain.
Telegram integration for memory ingestion is not currently active and will be evaluated for future phases.

details: Durable memory rule for Slack ingestion interface committed.
Deferred action for Telegram integration recorded.
